approach: backfill + realign the universal-plugin project spec into the canonical colocated packages/universal-plugin/.agents/spec (from the legacy non-SDD packages/universal-plugin/specs tree); capability-first, two concerns: the plugin command group (build/validate/init) + governance name-resolution

declared out of scope: marketplace/plugin-install/hook -> cyberplace; agent-facing authoring skills -> cyberspace/aced; the shipped cross-vendor sync engine (prepare-detect/sync/self-update/publish/asset-store/registries/state) -> destined to leave; design-doc prepare (artifact-copy) -> dropped (ADR-0001)

all-additive: no pre-existing frozen scenario narrowed. plugin build re-nests universal-plugin build -> universal-plugin plugin build (breaking CLI change) but user-authorized in the mission plan. plugin/validate + plugin/init are spec-first / impl-deferred. Self-asserting at the spec gate (by agent) since additive + user approved the plan; hard floors still stop.

why: new SDD project spec for the universal-plugin package (5 nodes: plugin/build, plugin/validate, plugin/init, governance + descriptive plugin/ group index + acceptance placeholder). cold sdd-spec-judge 3-lens {oracle,builder,architect} all PASS ALIGNED true; one Builder blocker (governance.feature had two Feature: keywords -> invalid Gherkin) fixed by merging to one Feature+Background, re-graded PASS. check-spec-state OK, check-suite OK, check-spec-structure 0/0, concept-index no drift, referenced-artifact OK. governance.feature frozen to the shipped 6-scope resolver (managed/project/local/user/package + store for namespaced lookups; dead cli-command ref corrected to plugin-design) per ADR-0002. all-additive, no prior frozen scenario touched.

cold sdd-impl-judge (ADR-0016; oracle re-derived per frozen scenario, real CLI driven against fresh fixtures) -> IMPLEMENTATION_PASS true for the two IMPLEMENTED nodes plugin/build + governance; all 26 frozen scenarios pass. First pass found 3 real conformance gaps: build missing-manifest raw fs read shadowed the friendly error, and governance show/list only wired --json not the frozen --format json. Fixed: src/build/build.ts existence guard before the indent read; src/governance/cli.ts --format option on show+list. +3 regression tests (126 pass, was 123). plugin/validate + plugin/init are spec-first / impl-deferred (ADR-0001; no impl delivered this CR) -> NOT certified; root stays approved (not implemented) until a future mission builds them. no frozen .feature edited.
